_readme: Add manual overrides here. Re-run generate_sprint_dashboard.py to apply. No Claude needed.

pbi_state_overrides._readme: Force a specific PBI's state for metric calculations only (does not change Excel). Format: {"<WorkItemID>": "<ForcedState>"}

goal_overrides._readme: Force a PBI into a specific goal bucket. Format: {"<WorkItemID>": "<GoalName>"}

notes: Sprint 79 Day 1: Removed Priyanka Kusal tasks (63988,64547,64548,64545,64546) - incorrect sprint assignment
QAComplete goal: only ST To Do / LIVE / Ready For LIVE / QA Complete count as done (per PO)
